text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I'm walking around the<n>academy at night, I
notice a fragrant<n>aroma wafting toward me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before long, I recognize it as the smell<n>of coffee.
Upon investigating, I realize<n>it's coming from
Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I know. I'm just finishing up my<n>drink before I
head back.
choice_data_list: You're not scared being in the dark all alone?
You're not scared being in the dark all alone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I know. I'm just finishing up my<n>drink before I
head back.
choice_data_list: You're not scared being in the dark all alone?
You're not scared being in the dark all alone?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I came across some decent<n>Guatemala full city
roast that piqued<n>my interest...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And I just really felt like enjoying its<n>aroma
today.
choice_data_list:
Isn't it hard to sleep after drinking coffee so
late?

Isn't it hard to sleep after drinking coffee so
late?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No. It calms me and makes sleeping<n>easier.
Coffee affects people<n>differently...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I find it more relaxing to drink at night.<n>It lets me
take the time to savor it...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I come here when I want to relax...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's easier for me to focus in the dark.<n>I feel more
attuned to scents and<n>flavors... temperatures and
sounds.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
When my senses are sharpened,<n>coffee tastes
more delicious.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And it's easier both to think... and not<n>to think in
the dark.
